memberdef.definition: typedef bool(* SYN_Modbus_WriteCallback) (struct SYN_Modbus *mb, uint16_t addr, uint16_t count, void *ctx)
memberdef.argsstring: )(struct SYN_Modbus *mb, uint16_t addr, uint16_t count, void *ctx)
memberdef.name: SYN_Modbus_WriteCallback

briefdescription.para: Called before a write to holding registers is applied.

simplesect.para: true to allow the write, false to reject (exception 0x03).

memberdef.definition: typedef bool(* SYN_Modbus_ReadFileRecordCallback) (struct SYN_Modbus *mb, uint16_t file_num, uint16_t record_num, uint16_t record_len, uint16_t *record_data, void *ctx)
memberdef.argsstring: )(struct SYN_Modbus *mb, uint16_t file_num, uint16_t record_num, uint16_t record_len, uint16_t *record_data, void *ctx)
memberdef.name: SYN_Modbus_ReadFileRecordCallback

memberdef.definition: typedef bool(* SYN_Modbus_WriteFileRecordCallback) (struct SYN_Modbus *mb, uint16_t file_num, uint16_t record_num, uint16_t record_len, const uint16_t *record_data, void *ctx)
memberdef.argsstring: )(struct SYN_Modbus *mb, uint16_t file_num, uint16_t record_num, uint16_t record_len, const uint16_t *record_data, void *ctx)
memberdef.name: SYN_Modbus_WriteFileRecordCallback

parameterdescription.para: Frame buffer (must be at least 256 bytes).

briefdescription.para: Poll for incoming Modbus requests and process them.

detaileddescription.para: Call from your main loop. This reads bytes from UART, detects frame boundaries (3.5 character times silence), validates CRC, and processes the request.

simplesect.para: true if a request was processed.

briefdescription.para: Feed a byte to the Modbus receiver.

detaileddescription.para: Alternative to poll() — call from UART ISR if you want interrupt-driven reception.

briefdescription.para: Process a complete frame (call after feed + silence detection).

simplesect.para: true if a response was sent.

detaileddescription.para: Implements a Modbus RTU slave using UART, CRC-16/Modbus (in syn_crc), and register/bit maps. Supports all 19 function codes:

listitem.para: 0x02: Read Discrete Inputs - 0x10: Write Multiple Registers
0x03: Read Holding Registers - 0x11: Report Server ID
0x04: Read Input Registers - 0x14: Read File Record
0x05: Write Single Coil - 0x15: Write File Record
0x06: Write Single Register - 0x16: Mask Write Register
0x07: Read Exception Status - 0x17: Read/Write Multiple Registers
0x08: Serial Line Diagnostics - 0x18: Read FIFO Queue
0x0B: Get Comm Event Counter - 0x2B: Read Device Identification

detaileddescription.para: The register/coil maps are application-owned arrays. The Modbus module handles framing, CRC validation, and exception responses.
